items.title: Portfolio Website
items.description: A modern responsive portfolio built with clean UI and animations.

items.title: Alif Tools
items.description:
ALIF Tools is a modern, fast, and privacy-focused online platform for processing PDF and image files with ease.
It is designed to be simple, secure, and completely free for everyone.

items.title: Alif Blog
items.description: A dynamic digital space by Alif, delivering curated tech insights, breaking industry news, and deep-dive tutorials for the modern web.

items.title: Tutor Flow
items.description: Tutor Flow is an interactive platform that connects tutors with students, providing structured learning paths and session management.

items.title: Web Poll
items.description: Web Poll is a web-based polling application that allows users to create and participate in online polls.

items.title: SOT Payment Management System
items.description: A comprehensive payment management system for handling various payment gateways and transactions.
